economic_ownership_map.label: Homebuilding owner earnings
economic_ownership_map.evidence: 2025 Form 10-K homebuilding earnings and cash-flow disclosures.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Normalize margins, cancellations, housing starts, and working capital; capitalize cash earnings after maintenance needs, not peak GAAP earnings.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Mortgage banking
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Separate mortgage economics from homebuilding and normalize origination volumes, gain-on-sale margins, and repurchase exposure.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Net surplus cash
economic_ownership_map.evidence: 2025 Form 10-K cash less senior notes; operating and mortgage liquidity buffers require further review.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Credit only cash demonstrably surplus to land deposits, working capital, mortgage funding, and debt.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Controlled-lot and future-community optionality
economic_ownership_map.evidence: NVR primarily controls lots through forfeitable deposits rather than owning land; community-level inventory remains to be reconciled.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Value the asymmetric lot-control structure separately from current earnings, net of deposits, abandonment, and time-to-open.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Housing-cycle and execution reserve
economic_ownership_map.evidence: 2025 backlog was 8,448 units and cancellation rate 17%; regional and affordability stresses require normalization.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Deduct for lower volumes/margins, cancellation risk, community delays, and buybacks executed above intrinsic value.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Homebuilding owner earnings
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Normalize margins, cancellations, housing starts, and working capital; capitalize cash earnings after maintenance needs, not peak GAAP earnings.

top_value_drivers.label: Mortgage banking
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Separate mortgage economics from homebuilding and normalize origination volumes, gain-on-sale margins, and repurchase exposure.

top_value_drivers.label: Net surplus cash
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Credit only cash demonstrably surplus to land deposits, working capital, mortgage funding, and debt.

top_value_drivers.label: Controlled-lot and future-community optionality
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Value the asymmetric lot-control structure separately from current earnings, net of deposits, abandonment, and time-to-open.

top_value_drivers.label: Housing-cycle and execution reserve
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Deduct for lower volumes/margins, cancellation risk, community delays, and buybacks executed above intrinsic value.

blockers: controlled_lot_inventory: Reconcile controlled lots, deposits, ownership, opening cadence, abandonment rates, and remaining development obligations.
homebuilding_owner_earnings: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
housing_cycle_and_execution_reserve: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
lot_control_and_future_communities: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
mortgage_banking: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
net_surplus_cash: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
owner_earnings_cycle: Normalize community-level volume, margin, cancellations, working capital, and maintenance needs across a housing cycle.
surplus_cash: Separate truly distributable cash from homebuilding, mortgage, and stress-liquidity requirements.

falsifiers: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
cohort_purpose: Land-light homebuilding, owner earnings, housing cycle, and repurchase economics.
